meta.title: DEF CON 30 Car Hacking Village - Evadsnibor - Getting Naughty on CAN bus with CHV Badge
meta.description: Explain how the CHV badge can generate CAN waveforms (and other digital protocols) with different errors to disrupt vehicle networks. More than an ARB, the generation can be interactive - where the waveform can change based on the response of the network. The talk will focus on the Raspberry Pi rp2040 in the CHV badge and its hacker potential.
